features: Soft bristles, specifically designed to clean the tooth surfaces and around the gum line in a gentle way.
Small soft brush head is suitable to clean even the harder to reach areas to provide a thorough gentle clean.
The non-slip handle provides a secure hold and allows good control when brushing teeth.
description: Product description Sensodyne Sensitive toothbrush is specially designed for gentle, yet thorough cleaning of teeth. This toothbrush comes with soft, round-ended bristles - which flex on contact with surfaces, and is therefore gentle on teeth and gums. The broad handle of the brush ensures a comfortable grip, while the oval head and slim neck ensures reach in hard-to-reach areas, achieving effective cleaning. Directions Wet the toothbrush, apply toothpaste, brush teeth in a circular motion for at least two minutes, and rinse the mouth and toothbrush afterwards. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years old due to potential choking hazards See more
